title: PayPal Holdings PYPL Stock Forecast Price Targets and Analyst Predictions
text: PayPal analyst price target estimates show consensus rating of Hold based on 27 Wall Street analysts. Average price target is $49.05 based on 12-month price targets. Another source shows consensus rating of Hold with average price target of $61.48. Out of 17 analysts, 1 recommends Strong Buy, 1 Buy, 12 Hold, 0 Sell, and 3 Strong Sell. Next quarter earnings estimate is $1.29 with range of $1.25-$1.49. Next quarter sales forecast is $8.47B. PYPL earnings growth forecast at 6.09% per year versus industry average of 20.56%.
